name: Super Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit with the rack in the center position of the oven.
2. Grease three cookie sheets with vegetable oil.
3. In a bowl, cream together butter, sugars, water, egg, and vanilla extract until well combined.
4. Add the sifted flour, salt, cinnamon, baking soda, cloves, chocolate chips, nuts, and oats to the mixture. Mix until just combined.
5. Using a spoon, form mounds about 2 inches apart on the prepared cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
7. Turn the racks once halfway through baking.
8. Remove the cookie sheets from the oven and allow them to cool on wire racks.
This recipe makes approximately 50 cookies.
